mod.careerchronicle.name: Career Chronicle
careerchronicle.passive.infernal_dominio: Passive: Infernal Dominion — Fire immune while held, attacks deal burn damage
careerchronicle.passive.absolute_frost: Passive: Absolute Frost — Attacks deeply slow and weaken targets
careerchronicle.passive.soul_harvest: Passive: Soul Harvest — Attacks lifesteal and apply wither
careerchronicle.passive.wind_walker: Passive: Wind Walker — Speed boost while held
careerchronicle.passive.predator_mark: Passive: Predator Mark — Night vision while held, attacks mark targets
careerchronicle.passive.berserker_rage: Passive: Berserker Rage — Massive damage boost at low health
careerchronicle.passive.death_sentence: Passive: Death Sentence — Execute damage on low health targets
careerchronicle.passive.divine_grace: Passive: Divine Grace — Regeneration while held
careerchronicle.passive.martyr_blessing: Passive: Martyr's Blessing — Absorption and regen while held
careerchronicle.passive.shadow_step: Passive: Shadow Step — Speed boost while held, attacks blind and poison
careerchronicle.passive.earthquake: Passive: Earthquake — Resistance while held, attacks knockback and slow
careerchronicle.passive.life_drain: Passive: Life Drain — Attacks apply heavy wither and restore large health
careerchronicle.item.skill_weapon.use_hi: Right-click to cast the bound career skill; successful casts consume durability.
careerchronicle.trait.adaptable.desc: Gain 25 extra career XP when selecting a class, favoring multiclass fusion routes.
careerchronicle.trait.keen_senses.desc: Periodically gains night vision, making exploration and ranged combat steadier.
careerchronicle.trait.stout_guard.desc: Periodically gains brief resistance, favoring defense, guarding, and melee pressure.
careerchronicle.trait.battle_fervor.desc: Periodically gains brief strength, favoring melee burst, stamina, and warrior routes.
careerchronicle.trait.dark_vitality.desc: Extra weakness from holy damage, but regenerates in dark environments. Favors necromancy, darkness, and sacrifice routes.
careerchronicle.trait.infernal_pact.desc: Immune to fire damage, but takes extra frost/water effects. Favors fire, cost, and hidden routes.
careerchronicle.ui.race_intro: Race shapes passive traits, class routes, and later fusion options.
careerchronicle.ui.title: Career Chronicle
careerchronicle.ui.class_unavailable_rac: Current race %s cannot choose this class
careerchronicle.ui.class_unavailable_hid: Hidden career clue has not been revealed
careerchronicle.ui.class_unavailable_seg: 0.2 Alpha allows up to %s class segments
careerchronicle.ui.manual_overview_hint: Select a tab above to browse details
careerchronicle.ui.hint: Right-click the manual or press C; Z/X/V/B or skill weapons cast visible effects.
careerchronicle.hidden.ashen_warden.clue: A history of flame and shield leaves warm ash.
careerchronicle.message.class_segments_f: 0.2 Alpha currently allows up to %s class segments.
careerchronicle.message.class_segment_re: Segment %s class choice is ready. Open the career screen to choose.
careerchronicle.message.skill_cooling: Skill cooling down, about %s seconds left.
careerchronicle.message.hidden_clue_reve: A new hidden career clue was added to the career manual.
careerchronicle.attr.str.desc: Increases melee damage and carry weight
careerchronicle.attr.dex.desc: Increases ranged damage and movement speed
careerchronicle.attr.int.desc: Increases spell damage and max mana
careerchronicle.attr.wis.desc: Increases healing power and mana regen
careerchronicle.command.player_only: This Career Chronicle command can only be used by a player.
careerchronicle.command.no_data: Career Chronicle data is not attached to this player.
careerchronicle.hidden.lich.clue: The chill of the abyss intertwines with whispers of the dead. Death is not the end.
careerchronicle.hidden.death_knight.clue: A chronicle of steel and shadow forges undying will to fight.
careerchronicle.message.race_already_sel: You have already selected a race and cannot change it.
careerchronicle.message.skill_not_equipp: Skill %s is not equipped in your loadout.
careerchronicle.race.human.desc: Blank Page Soul — born with an almost empty page, accepting any ink's inscription.
careerchronicle.race.elf.desc: Starlight Soul — the soul carries a faint stellar glow, keenly attuned to distant things.
careerchronicle.race.dwarf.desc: Bronze Ink Soul — solid and unyielding as forged iron, built to endure.
careerchronicle.race.orc.desc: Red-Iron Soul — the soul boils from birth, branded by the heat of battle.
careerchronicle.race.undead.desc: Withered Ink Soul — reverse-chronicled at the moment of death, preserving the strength of a former life.
careerchronicle.race.demon.desc: Infernal Ink Soul — inscribed by Nether flame-ink, fiercer and more dangerous than crimson.
careerchronicle.class.fire_mage.desc: Crimson Flame Chapter — wielding the oldest offensive ink, enlightenment found in the gaze of a campfire.
careerchronicle.class.archer.desc: Feathered Flight Chapter — will crosses distance; every hit etches a mark upon the soul.
careerchronicle.class.warrior.desc: Iron Edge Chapter — every choice made in close combat on the edge of life and death.
careerchronicle.class.priest.desc: Golden Radiance Chapter — the only ink inscribed by giving, not by taking.
careerchronicle.class.guardian.desc: Bulwark Chapter — body as shield; each blow absorbed for another deepens the inscription.
careerchronicle.class.rogue.desc: Shadow Chapter — shadow ink does not carve the soul; it erases the traces.
careerchronicle.class.ice_mage.desc: Frostbound Chapter — stilling all things; azure ink mirrors crimson.
careerchronicle.class.necromancer.desc: Withered Dark Chapter — conversing with death; abyssal ink drawn from departed souls.
careerchronicle.class.ashen_warden.desc: Forbidden Chapter — when crimson flame and bulwark ink collide, fire solidifies into an ashen shield.
careerchronicle.class.lich.desc: Forbidden Chapter — abyssal ink overloads the soul's vessel; the spirit tears free from flesh.
careerchronicle.class.death_knight.desc: Forbidden Chapter — iron and abyssal ink coexist, forging an undying will that refuses to fall.
careerchronicle.skill.fireball.desc: Crimson ink coalesces in the palm, hurled forth as a searing fireball.
careerchronicle.skill.ember_burst.desc: Crimson ink erupts from within, scorching all living things nearby.
careerchronicle.skill.flame_step.desc: Feet leave crimson afterimages; the body becomes a streak of flame.
careerchronicle.skill.inferno_focus.desc: Deeply inscribed crimson ink; fire fills the body, warping the air with heat.
careerchronicle.skill.meteor_rite.desc: Crimson inscription at its zenith — the sky splits and burning meteors descend.
careerchronicle.skill.charged_shot.desc: Verdant ink gathers at the arrowhead; fully drawn, it pierces the target.
careerchronicle.skill.scatter_shot.desc: Verdant ink inscribes three feathered paths at once; arrows fan outward.
careerchronicle.skill.snare_shot.desc: Verdant ink weaves binding force; on impact, the target can barely move.
careerchronicle.skill.eagle_eye.desc: Verdant ink sinks into the eyes; vision sharpens, every distant detail laid bare.
careerchronicle.skill.storm_marksman.des: Verdant inscription fully awakened — every arrow carries the storm's force through its mark.
careerchronicle.skill.lunge_strike.desc: Iron ink propels the body forward; the blade carves an arc of light.
careerchronicle.skill.guard_stance.desc: Iron ink hardens into a defensive stance; bronze ink shields the body at the cost of speed.
careerchronicle.skill.ground_slam.desc: Iron ink floods into fists that slam the earth; shockwaves ripple outward.
careerchronicle.skill.iron_vanguard.desc: Deeply inscribed iron ink; the whole body gleams with inscription-forged armor.
careerchronicle.skill.unyielding_colossu: Iron inscription at its zenith — an immovable colossus that repels everything nearby.
careerchronicle.skill.mend.desc: Golden ink flows from the fingertips; warm light mends the wound.
careerchronicle.skill.holy_nova.desc: Golden ink radiates outward from the body, healing allies while searing darkness.
careerchronicle.skill.blessing.desc: Golden ink inscribes a blessing upon the self; strength and vitality surge together.
careerchronicle.skill.seraphic_grace.des: Deeply inscribed golden ink; radiance falls upon nearby allies as wounds slowly close.
Golden inscription at its zenith — a sanctuary descends from above, sheltering allies, staggering foes.
careerchronicle.skill.shield_wall.desc: Bronze ink solidifies into an invisible barrier; shoulders bear an unshakable weight.
careerchronicle.skill.provoke.desc: Bronze ink reverberates in a silent roar, forcing nearby foes to turn and face.
careerchronicle.skill.aegis_smash.desc: Bronze ink floods the shield; the earth cracks under the aegis strike.
Deeply inscribed bronze ink; the bulwark inscription doubles in strength, nearly impenetrable.
careerchronicle.skill.impregnable_fortre: Bronze inscription at its zenith — a living fortress; damage dissolves before it.
careerchronicle.skill.shadow_strike.desc: Shadow ink dissolves the silhouette; a lethal strike emerges from the dark.
careerchronicle.skill.smoke_bomb.desc: Shadow ink bursts into thick smoke; the figure vanishes entirely within.
careerchronicle.skill.blade_flurry.desc: Shadow ink quickens the hands; blades become a storm of afterimages tearing through foes.
careerchronicle.skill.assassin_mark.desc: Deeply inscribed shadow ink brands a death mark upon the target.
careerchronicle.skill.death_blossom.desc: Shadow inscription at its zenith — a spinning blossom of blades; nothing nearby survives.
careerchronicle.skill.frost_bolt.desc: Azure ink crystallizes into a frozen bolt; frost spreads where it strikes.
careerchronicle.skill.frozen_ground.desc: Azure ink seeps into the earth; everything underfoot freezes into glacial ground.
careerchronicle.skill.blizzard.desc: Azure ink summons a blizzard; shards of ice and bitter wind ravage the area.
careerchronicle.skill.glacial_prison.des: Deeply inscribed azure ink; solid ice erupts from the ground, imprisoning the target.
careerchronicle.skill.absolute_zero.desc: Azure inscription at its zenith — all molecules halt; life freezes in silent oblivion.
careerchronicle.skill.soul_drain.desc: Abyssal ink drains life from the target's soul, converting it into one's own strength.
careerchronicle.skill.bone_spike.desc: Abyssal ink drives bone spikes from the ground, impaling the unwary.
careerchronicle.skill.undead_shield.desc: Abyssal ink weaves undead force into a shield, emanating the chill of death.
careerchronicle.skill.death_coil.desc: Abyssal ink spirals into a coiling bolt; it takes life and heals the caster.
careerchronicle.skill.lich_form.desc: Abyssal inscription at its zenith — the soul briefly leaves the flesh, gaining undead power.
careerchronicle.skill.flame_arrow.desc: Crimson and verdant ink resonate — the arrow ignites on the string, its trail a burning arc.
careerchronicle.skill.blazing_charge.des: Crimson and iron ink resonate — wreathed in flame, the charge burns everything in its path.
careerchronicle.skill.sunfire_aegis.desc: Crimson and golden ink resonate — sunfire condenses into sheltering light, scorching encroaching darkness.
careerchronicle.skill.piercing_volley.de: Verdant and iron ink resonate — armor-piercing arrows pour down like a rainstorm.
careerchronicle.skill.guiding_light_arro: Verdant and golden ink resonate — the arrow is guided by holy light, never straying from its mark.
careerchronicle.skill.consecrated_slam.d: Iron and golden ink resonate — a consecrated slam shatters the ground, wounding foes and healing allies.
careerchronicle.skill.shield_breaker.des: Bronze and iron ink resonate — the shield becomes a blade, shattering defenses in one strike.
careerchronicle.skill.sentinel_volley.de: Bronze and verdant ink resonate — the sentinel's will becomes a distant rain of arrows.
careerchronicle.skill.flame_ward.desc: Bronze and crimson ink resonate — flame solidifies into a warding barrier, scorching intruders.
careerchronicle.skill.sacred_shield.desc: Bronze and golden ink resonate — holy light blankets the shield, sheltering nearby allies.
careerchronicle.skill.shadow_guard.desc: Bronze and shadow ink resonate — a guard cloaked in darkness; foes weaken without knowing why.
careerchronicle.skill.surprise_assault.d: Shadow and iron ink resonate — a strike from nowhere, a thunderous assault launched from the dark.
careerchronicle.skill.phantom_arrow.desc: Shadow and verdant ink resonate — the arrow flies in silence; the target falls never knowing its origin.
careerchronicle.skill.shadow_flame.desc: Shadow and crimson ink resonate — flame burns within the dark, invisible yet searing.
careerchronicle.skill.silent_prayer.desc: Shadow and golden ink resonate — a prayer uttered in silence, healing without a trace.
careerchronicle.skill.soul_reaper.desc: Shadow and abyssal ink resonate — reaping souls in darkness; the target's life slips away unnoticed.
careerchronicle.skill.thermal_shock.desc: Azure and crimson ink resonate — extreme temperature tears the target apart; ice and fire bloom together.
careerchronicle.skill.frost_arrow.desc: Azure and verdant ink resonate — the arrow glistens with frost; ice spreads from the point of impact.
careerchronicle.skill.frozen_blade.desc: Azure ink sheathes the iron blade; frost spreads where it cuts.
Azure and golden ink resonate — crystal and holy light interweave into a sanctuary where allies recover.
careerchronicle.skill.permafrost_wall.de: Azure and bronze ink resonate — an ice wall rises from the ground, never to thaw.
careerchronicle.skill.frozen_soul.desc: Azure and abyssal ink resonate — shards of a frozen soul become weapons, piercing the living.
careerchronicle.skill.death_strike.desc: Abyssal and iron ink resonate — every strike carries death's echo.
careerchronicle.skill.spectral_arrow.des: Abyssal and verdant ink resonate — a spectral arrow passes through flesh to strike the soul.
careerchronicle.skill.hellfire.desc: Abyssal and crimson ink resonate — fire from the abyss; it burns not the body, but the soul.
careerchronicle.skill.twilight_mend.desc: Abyssal and golden ink resonate — at the border of light and dark, life is mended by forbidden means.
careerchronicle.skill.ashen_bulwark.desc: Forbidden inscription — crimson ink solidifies into an ashen shield; flame no longer burns, but guards.
careerchronicle.skill.withering_strike.d: Forbidden inscription — a strike woven of iron and abyssal ink; the target withers from within.
careerchronicle.skill.runic_ward.desc: Forbidden inscription — abyssal runes surface upon the armor, forming an undying ward.
careerchronicle.skill.death_domain.desc: Forbidden inscription — abyssal ink spreads into a domain of death; living things within slowly perish.
careerchronicle.skill.frozen_domain.desc: Forbidden inscription — a domain of frozen souls woven from azure and abyssal ink; all things solidify within.
careerchronicle.skill.legion_of_the_dead: Forbidden inscription — abyssal ink summons a legion of the dead; the fallen awaken from the earth.
careerchronicle.skill.lich_ascension.des: Forbidden inscription — the soul transcends the flesh; power beyond death is attained.
